outcomes: Added lian push coverage to central, security, governance, DSH operational, and dedicated full-stack workflows

Kept branch protection, required checks, and independent approval as NOT_PROVEN
Established canonical merged DSH capability registry
Derived manifest capabilities, operations, surfaces, and runtime posture from explicit owners
Marked historical runtime evidence as not valid for the current commit
Established active DSH contract registry and contract/client drift guard
Removed heuristic product units and local price multiplication
Removed dead store banner, image, search, share, and cart actions
Removed unsafe fulfillment casts
Rebuilt cart around DSH cart and serviceability controllers
Removed seeded addresses, localStorage persistence, random map coordinates, fake subscription success, local cart total calculation, and hardcoded checkout area
Derived checkout service area from live store data
Kept only WLT-supported COD available and removed local payment amount claims
Added client-commerce anti-regression journey guard to lian CI
Added authenticated client-address OpenAPI contract
Added PostgreSQL ownership, default uniqueness, soft deletion, optimistic concurrency, idempotency, and audit events
Added protected CRUD and default-address handlers
Bound address selection to serviceability and checkout
Added address and checkout database tests and workflow
Added fail-closed shared mutation headers
Added deterministic idempotency-key generation
Added tests for delivery, field commission, actor finance, settlement, commercial, promotion-funding, and subscription mutations
Kept production provider mutations fail-closed
Activated the field offline queue for visits, checks, completion, and escalations
Reused mutation correlation and idempotency context during synchronization
Removed synthetic visits and invalid location success
Persisted payout attempts across restart and blocked requests above balance
Bound account gates to Workforce states
Registered governed client, partner, captain, and operator support operations
Added ownership, permission, ticket-message, transition, idempotency, correlation, and event-audit paths
Bound partner support navigation to a real support surface
Kept Media evidence and governed SLA policy outside the closure claim
